name: efficient-transformer-long
description: Build transformers that efficiently process long documents through sparse attention patterns avoiding quadratic memory complexity.
paperTitle: Efficient Transformer Architectures for Long Documents
keywords: transformers, long-range, attention efficiency, sparse attention, scalability
content:
## Efficient Transformer Architectures for Long Documents

Standard attention is O(n²). Sparse patterns make long documents tractable.

### Core Concept

Standard attention is O(n²). Sparse patterns make long documents tractable. This enables efficient model development and deployment.
